parsed_review.summary: CP00-827 is a clean, faithful descriptor-only continuation of the RP27 Platform Extensibility lineage (CP820-826), verified through Read/Grep/Glob only. (1) Implementation — packages/platform/src/registry.js defines the PlatformExtensibilityCp827InterfacePermissionAuditBridge case set and descriptor sourced from CP826; M04=19 rows (INTERFACE_ROWS.slice(1,20), titles S02 Request contract through S20 Command rerun) and M05=21 rows (slice(0,21), S01 Public export map through S21 Schema drift check) match the plan baseline exactly. Every row is built by createRow with descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, all *_included secret/real-data flags false, plus NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (api_key_issued/webhook_delivered/workflow_executed/permission_decision_written/audit_event_written all false). (2) Validators — packages/platform/src/validators.js enforces descriptor type, source descriptor, authority boundary (claude_is_final_approval=false, human approval required for runtime opening, local validation != enterprise trust), section/row counts, per-row no-secret/no-real-data, no runtime opening, no writes, Hermes/Claude packet shape, and handoff routing to CP00-828/RP27.P03.M05.S22. (3) Tests — packages/platform/test/model.test.js asserts coverage (by_deliverable, M04=19/M05=21), descriptor runtime-closed, and contract projection currency; scripts/validate-rp27-platform-extensibility-contract.mjs wires coverage+descriptor+contract+upstream-binding checks. (4) Contract — the generated contracts/platform-extensibility-contract.json has latest_pack CP00-827, latest_projection descriptor, M05 row_count 21, validation.valid=true, no_write_attestation all-false, and handoff to CP00-828/RP27.P03.M05.S22. (5) Boundaries — manifest marks descriptor-only, production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false, enterprise trust not claimed; Hermes packet emits_runtime_receipt=false (deterministic review evidence only, not product runtime). (6) Review hardening — readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1436-byte valid JSON result, no error); validation-report shows prompt within size limit, no embedded full diff/source, only Read/Grep/Glob tools, and zero omitted active untracked implementation files; changed-file-scope correctly isolates the two unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room). Claude remains a read-only reviewer and not final approver — that authority boundary is expected and does not set blocks_goal_closeout. No P0/P1/P2 issues found. The single P3 is informational: downstream closeout artifacts (command-evidence.json, construction-inspection.json, adjudication.md, claude-review-result.json, plus this review's receipt) are not yet present, which is the expected pre-closeout state (closed pack CP00-826 carries the full set). Verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS; does not block pack or goal closeout.

findings.title: Post-review closeout artifacts pending (expected pre-closeout state)
findings.details: docs/closeout-packs/cp00-827/ currently contains only manifest.json. The manifest's required_pack_artifacts and per-unit evidence_refs point to command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, none of which exist yet; artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-827/ likewise has no raw-output.json or review-receipt.json. This matches expected pre-closeout sequencing: the closed pack CP00-826 carries the complete artifact set, confirming these are generated downstream of this read-only review. The manifest accordingly reads status=in_progress, production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, production_ready_descriptor_verified=false, and pack_level_claude_review.status=pending_review with empty valid_review_receipts.
findings.recommendation: Non-blocking for this read-only review. At actual closeout, ensure this review's receipt plus command-evidence.json, construction-inspection.json, and adjudication.md are generated, and the manifest descriptor-verified/production_ready flag is set, before committing the pack as closed.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected pre-closeout state, not a defect. Recorded for the closeout authority. Does not block pack or goal closeout.
